title: Basic Lead Entity
prompt: Create a SolarLead entity with 5 fields: Name (String), Email (Regex-validated), CreatedDate (ISO), Status (Enum: New/Contacted/Qualified/Lost), and Revenue (Currency, numeric).

title: SDUI Form Generation
prompt: Generate a Server-Driven UI form configuration for the SolarLead entity, including a date-picker for CreatedDate and a currency input for Revenue.

title: Project Entity
prompt: Create a Project entity with fields: Title (String, required), Description (Text), StartDate (ISO), EndDate (ISO), and Priority (Enum: Low/Medium/High/Critical).

title: Employee Record
prompt: Create an Employee entity with: FullName (String), Email (Regex), Department (Enum: Engineering/Sales/Marketing/Operations/HR), HireDate (ISO), and Salary (Currency).

title: Product Catalog Entry
prompt: Create a Product entity with: SKU (String, unique), ProductName (String), Category (Enum: Electronics/Furniture/Software/Services), UnitPrice (Currency), and InStock (Boolean).

title: Support Ticket
prompt: Create a Ticket entity with: Subject (String, required), Description (Text), Priority (Enum: P1/P2/P3/P4), Channel (Enum: Email/Phone/Chat/Portal), and CreatedAt (ISO, auto-generated).

title: Contact with Validation
prompt: Create a Contact entity with: FirstName (String), LastName (String), Phone (Regex: international format), Email (Regex), and PreferredLanguage (Enum: EN/ES/FR/DE/PT).

title: Milestone Entity
prompt: Create a Milestone entity with: Name (String), DueDate (ISO), Status (Enum: Pending/InProgress/Completed/Overdue), and Completion (Number, 0-100).

title: Leave Request
prompt: Create a LeaveRequest entity with: EmployeeName (String), LeaveType (Enum: Vacation/Sick/Personal/Parental), StartDate (ISO), EndDate (ISO), and DaysRequested (Number).

successCriteria.urc: Date range renders as dual picker

title: Warehouse Location
prompt: Create a Warehouse entity with: Code (String, unique), City (String), Country (String), Capacity (Number), and IsActive (Boolean).

title: Account → Contact (1:N)
prompt: Create an Accounts entity and a Contacts entity with a 1:N relationship. Include a foreign key constraint and ensure that deleting an Account cascades to its Contacts.

title: Lead Status Constraint
prompt: Create a Lead entity with Status (Enum) and Revenue (Currency). Add a validation rule: Status cannot be changed to 'Closed-Won' if Revenue is null or zero.

successCriteria.ce: Mutation to Closed-Won with null Revenue returns 422

title: Project → Tasks (1:N)
prompt: Create a Project entity and a Task entity with a 1:N relationship. Task has an Assignee and Status (Enum: Todo/InProgress/Done). Project cannot be 'Completed' if any Task is not 'Done'.

successCriteria.ce: Project completion blocked with open tasks

title: Department → Employees
prompt: Create a Department entity with Budget (Currency) and an Employee entity linked 1:N. The sum of employee Salaries cannot exceed the Department Budget.

title: Product → Movements (1:N)
prompt: Create a Product entity and an InventoryMovement entity (Type: In/Out, Quantity: Number) with 1:N relationship. Stock = sum of In minus sum of Out.

title: Ticket → Comments + SLA
prompt: Create a Ticket entity and a Comment entity (1:N). If Priority is P1, it must receive at least one Comment within one hour (SLABreached auto-flags).

title: Ticket ↔ Categories (M:N)
prompt: Create a Ticket entity and a Category entity with a many-to-many relationship through a junction table.

title: Supplier ↔ Products (M:N)
prompt: Create a Supplier and Product entity with M:N relationship. Junction table includes SupplierPrice. A Product can have different prices from different Suppliers.

title: Full CRM Module
prompt: Build a complete CRM module: Accounts, Contacts (1:N), Deals (1:N), pipeline workflow (Prospecting → Qualification → Proposal → Closed-Won/Lost), and dashboard with pipeline value by stage.

title: Task Management + Kanban
prompt: Build a Task Management module with Projects, Tasks (1:N), Assignees, status workflow (Draft → Active → Review → Closed), RBAC (Admin/Member/Viewer), and Kanban board.

title: Employee Onboarding
prompt: Build an onboarding system: Departments, Employees (1:N), OnboardingTasks (1:N per Employee). When a new Employee is created, auto-generate 5 default tasks.

title: Warehouse Management
prompt: Build a warehouse module: Products, Warehouses, InventoryLevels (M:N with Quantity), transfer workflow (Request → Approved → Shipped → Received), transfer cannot exceed source stock.

title: Help Desk + SLA Engine
prompt: Build a help desk: Tickets, Categories (M:N), Comments (1:N), Agents (1:1). P1 tickets must be assigned within 15 min and resolved within 4 hours. Dashboard with SLA compliance.

successCriteria.sv: Full schema + SLA automations + dashboard valid
